testcase: AI_COMPUTE: EXPLAIN with PARTITION BY shows WindowAggregate operator

explain.statement: SELECT true AS present FROM $explan AS p WHERE ANY v WITHIN p.plan.`~children` SATISFIES v.`#operator` = 'WindowAggregate' END

statements: SELECT AI_COMPUTE(d.text, {'action':'rerank', 'uri':'http://localhost:9999/rerank'}, 'database technology') OVER(PARTITION BY d.category) AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_compute'

testcase: AI_COMPUTE: EXPLAIN without PARTITION BY shows WindowAggregate operator

explain.statement: SELECT true AS present FROM $explan AS p WHERE ANY v WITHIN p.plan.`~children` SATISFIES v.`#operator` = 'WindowAggregate' END

statements: SELECT AI_COMPUTE(d.text, {'action':'rerank', 'uri':'http://localhost:9999/rerank'}, 'database technology') OVER() AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_compute'

testcase: AI_RERANK: EXPLAIN with PARTITION BY shows WindowAggregate operator

explain.statement: SELECT true AS present FROM $explan AS p WHERE ANY v WITHIN p.plan.`~children` SATISFIES v.`#operator` = 'WindowAggregate' END

statements: SELECT AI_RERANK(d.text, {'uri':'http://localhost:9999/rerank'}, 'database technology') OVER(PARTITION BY d.category) AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_rerank'

testcase: AI_RERANK: EXPLAIN without PARTITION BY shows WindowAggregate operator

explain.statement: SELECT true AS present FROM $explan AS p WHERE ANY v WITHIN p.plan.`~children` SATISFIES v.`#operator` = 'WindowAggregate' END

statements: SELECT AI_RERANK(d.text, {'uri':'http://localhost:9999/rerank'}, 'database technology') OVER() AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_rerank'

testcase: AI_COMPUTE: EXPLAIN without model field is accepted (model is optional)

explain.statement: SELECT true AS present FROM $explan AS p WHERE ANY v WITHIN p.plan.`~children` SATISFIES v.`#operator` = 'WindowAggregate' END

statements: SELECT AI_COMPUTE(d.text, {'action':'rerank', 'uri':'http://localhost:9999/rerank'}, 'database technology') OVER(PARTITION BY d.category) AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_compute'

testcase: AI_RERANK: EXPLAIN without model field is accepted (model is optional)

explain.statement: SELECT true AS present FROM $explan AS p WHERE ANY v WITHIN p.plan.`~children` SATISFIES v.`#operator` = 'WindowAggregate' END

statements: SELECT AI_RERANK(d.text, {'uri':'http://localhost:9999/rerank'}, 'database technology') OVER(PARTITION BY d.category) AS score FROM orders AS d WHERE d.test_id = 'ai_rerank'
